Module 5:
Over-the-shoulder Real Life
Example - The Brilliant
Recalls Launch
!
Executive Summary
Now we’re going to look at Susan Garrett's launch. To my knowledge this is
one of the most successful internal launches ever.
Susan is a dog agility trainer, and her list is under 20,000 people. She
joined Product Launch Formula in 2008, had no list, and relied entirely on
hope marketing.
She’s very highly accomplished as a dog trainer, and has won national and
world titles in this very small dog agility market. In the very first month at
Product Launch Formula she did a $27,000 launch. In the next year her
business grew by 640%.
This is one of the most successful internal launches I have ever heard
about, and remember I've been teaching this since 2005.
!
!
!
1	© 2014 Internet Alchemy, Inc.
GROUPINSIDERS.COM EXCLUSIVE

-- 1 of 3 --

PLC #1 of Susan Garrett’s Brilliant Recalls course
• 	She builds her authority through teaching - there’s a lot of value
delivered this way
• 	0:07 - She makes a big promise
• 	0:24 - She introduces her big why
• 	1:00 - “Clarity creates confidence” - here she begins teaching
• 	6:20 - Power of Story - tells a very relevant story and makes the point
(this is critical - don’t leave the viewer to assume)
• 	11:00 - Creates more likeability and admits that she isn’t perfect
• 	13:00 - At this mark she begins to agitate about dealing with unwanted
behavior
• 	Really takes the time to build up the pain of not training your dog
• 	14:00 - Talking about investment and payoff
• 	14:50 - Big promise
• 	16:50 - Winning investment - definitely watch this section (builds up a big
promise that the course will deliver on)
• 	16:59 - Here she starts to foreshadow the next video
• 	17:16 - The big why and community building
!
2	© 2014 Internet Alchemy, Inc.

-- 2 of 3 --

• 	18:04 - CTA - Asks for community to share the link and for comments on
video
In general this PLC provides lots of education, but it also paints the
opportunity perfectly and sets it all up for the offer.
There is a lot to learn from in this video, so take what works for you and
adapt it for your launch.
!
